description_long: This is a grand piano with a light wood finish, featuring a large, angled lid that is partially open, revealing the strings and internal structure. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, and a music stand with a blue and white pattern is positioned above the keys. The piano stands on three sturdy, blocky legs, with a central pedal assembly visible beneath the keyboard. The surface of the piano is smooth with a pixelated wood grain texture, giving it a stylized, almost digital appearance. The overall form is angular and geometric, with clean lines and a modern, minimalist aesthetic. The piano's lid, music stand, and pedals are all distinct, functional components.
description: A stylized grand piano with a light wood finish, partially open lid, and visible music stand. Features a geometric, pixelated design with a full keyboard and three sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the partially open lid, exposed strings, and full keyboard with music stand.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the large, closed portion of the lid and the back of the piano.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full expanse of the lid and the rectangular body shape.
description_view_3: Front view showing the keyboard, music stand, and three pedals beneath the keys.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard grand piano layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys, no visible missing or split keys.
